title: Merger of Two Infosys Wholly Owned Step-Down Subsidiaries in Romania Completed
detailed_summary: Infosys disclosed that the merger of two wholly owned step-down subsidiaries, In-tech Engineering services S.R.L Romania and ProIT S.R.L.RO Romania, was completed on January 8, 2026. The resultant entity is In-tech Engineering S.R.L. No financial terms, business impact, or strategic rationale were provided.

key_facts.fact: The merger between In-tech Engineering services S.R.L Romania and ProIT S.R.L.RO Romania was completed on January 8, 2026.
Both merging entities were wholly owned step down subsidiaries of Infosys.
The name of the resultant entity is In-tech Engineering S.R.L.
